2605.10815.title: Probing Cross-modal Information Hubs in Audio-Visual LLMs
2605.10815.paper_summary: Audio-visual large language models (AVLLMs) have recently emerged as a powerful architecture capable of jointly reasoning over audio, visual, and textual modalities. In AVLLMs, the bidirectional interaction between audio and video modalities introduces intricate processing dynamics, necessitating a deeper understanding of their internal mechanisms. However, unlike extensively studied text-only or large vision language models, the internal workings of AVLLMs remain largely unexplored. In this paper, we focus on cross-modal information flow between audio and visual modalities in AVLLMs, investigating where information derived from one modality is encoded within the token representations of the other modality. Through an analysis of multiple recent AVLLMs, we uncover two common findings. First, AVLLMs primarily encode integrated audio-visual information in sink tokens. Second, sink tokens do not uniformly hold cross-modal information. Instead, a distinct subset of sink tokens, which we term cross-modal sink tokens, specializes in storing such information. Based on these findings, we further propose a simple training-free hallucination mitigation method by encouraging reliance on integrated cross-modal information within cross-modal sink tokens. Our code is available at https://github.com/kaistmm/crossmodal-hub.
2605.10815.paper_summary_zh: 音視覺大型語言模型（AVLLMs）最近出現，作為一種強大的架構，能夠共同推理音頻、視覺和文本模態。在AVLLMs中，音頻和視頻模態之間的雙向互動引入了複雜的處理動態，這需要對其內部機制有更深入的理解。然而，與 extensively studied 的僅文本或大型視覺語言模型不同，AVLLMs 的內部運作仍然在很大程度上未被探索。在本文中，我們專注於AVLLMs中音頻和視覺模態之間的跨模態信息流，調查從一種模態衍生的信息在另一種模態的標記表示中是如何編碼的。通過對多個最近的AVLLMs進行分析，我們發現了兩個共同的發現。首先，AVLLMs 主要在接收標記中編碼綜合的音視覺信息。其次，接收標記並不均勻地持有跨模態信息。相反，我們稱之為跨模態接收標記的特定子集，專門用於儲存這種信息。基於這些發現，我們進一步提出了一種簡單的無需訓練的幻覺緩解方法，通過鼓勵依賴於跨模態接收標記中的綜合跨模態信息。我們的代碼可在 https://github.com/kaistmm/crossmodal-hub 獲得。
2605.10815.author: Jihoo Jung et.al.
2605.10815.authors: Jihoo Jung, Chaeyoung Jung, Ji-Hoon Kim, Joon Son Chung
